items.title: Off the Ball take petty & ill-informed look at Scottish football
items.summary: The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Norrie's French Open preparations hit by rib injury
items.summary: In a season when British players have been beset by fitness problems, Cameron Norrie says a rib injury has hampered his French Open preparation.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
